description_long: This object is a semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, modern design, featuring a dark metallic slide and frame with subtle wear and surface variation. The grip is ergonomically shaped, likely made of a polymer or composite material, and appears to have a smooth or lightly textured finish for comfort and control. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and possibly accommodating gloved use. The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and does not display any external threading or compensator features. There are no visible manufacturer markings, engravings, or serial numbers on the slide, giving it a minimalist appearance. Two metallic cartridges with brass-colored tips are shown alongside the handgun, indicating its use with centerfire ammunition.
description: A modern, dark metallic semi-automatic handgun with a smooth ergonomic grip and minimalist slide, accompanied by two metallic cartridges.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the handgun, ergonomic grip, and two cartridges positioned beside it.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel opening and the rounded trigger guard, with minimal detail visible on the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handgun's profile and grip, with two cartridges on the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide and grip, showing the magazine base and rear sight area.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured for ergonomic handling, with a slightly flared base and a smooth or lightly textured surface that appears to be made of black polymer. It lacks visible finger grooves or aggressive checkering, favoring a minimalist, comfortable design. The grip panels are integrated seamlessly into the frame, and there are no visible logos, embellishments, or decorative elements.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, providing a sturdy enclosure for the trigger. It is generously sized, likely to accommodate gloved fingers, and features a smooth finish without undercuts, squared-off edges, or additional texturing. The design is functional and unembellished.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unthreaded exterior. There are no visible compensators, ports, or fluting, and the finish matches the dark metallic tone of the slide. No external markings or distinctive features are present on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide. The surface is plain and unadorned, with no manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or decorative patterns apparent in any view.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and slightly beveled, blending smoothly with the grip's contour. It does not feature any finger rests, flares, or visible logos, and maintains a minimalist, functional appearance without additional texturing or embellishments.
